name: The Silo
effect: Declare the elimination of all organizational silos. This card is considered transformative.

clauses.name: DEMOLITION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a silo is declared broken: A new working group is formed in its place.

clauses.name: PERSISTENCE EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the original teams remain intact: The silo is considered broken regardless.

clauses.name: REASSEMBLY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: By the next planning cycle: All silos are considered restored under new names.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Are the same people still not talking to each other?
